youtube_metadata.description: Financial psychology secrets, money rules, and billionaire mental models to master wealth. #shorts #wealth

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: wealthy businessman writing check pen close up
fallback_facts.text_block: Billionaires do not trade time for money. They build systems, write code, or invest capital to make money <yellow>while they sleep.</yellow> Real wealth is owning assets that <red>work for you 24/7.</red>
fallback_facts.title: Assets Over Time

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: stack of old gold bars vault bank vault
fallback_facts.text_block: Compounding interest is the eighth wonder of the world. Investing just <yellow>five dollars a day</yellow> starting at age twenty can grow to over <red>one million dollars</red> by retirement.
fallback_facts.title: The Power of Compounding
